summary: Iteration 164: Integrated Evolution & Discovery Protocol - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 32/32 tests passed covering Refinement Lab (extraction tools, tumbler, starseed inventory), SmartDock Nexus (slot/unslot/state/eligible), and Wisdom Evolution (4-tier system, canopy planting). Frontend: All pages functional - Refinement Lab shows tumbler, starseed components, tool selector with Mohs ranges, specimen cards. SmartDock shows Emerald slotted with Heart chakra, 639 Hz, mantra. Dashboard has Refine and Dock quick-access buttons.
seed_data_creation: User has 6 specimens (Emerald, Moss Agate, Malachite, Green Tourmaline, Peridot, Jade), 1 Starseed component (Bio-Resonance Array, 25 power), Emerald slotted in SmartDock, ~1258 Cosmic Credits, Nexus subscription active
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 164 features fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/refinement/tools (3 tools: Brush Mohs 1-4, Pick Mohs 4-7, Chisel Mohs 7-10), POST /api/refinement/extract (tool-specimen extraction with quality based on Mohs match), POST /api/refinement/tumble (time-gated 4-48h based on rarity, Nexus gets 50% speed boost), GET /api/refinement/tumbler (shows active slots, progress, ready-to-collect), POST /api/refinement/collect (unlocks starseed component + spiritual data), POST /api/refinement/instant-finish (pay credits to skip timer), GET /api/refinement/starseed-inventory (components by category with total power). SmartDock: GET /api/smartdock/state (slotted stone with resonance effects), POST /api/smartdock/slot (triggers chakra palette + frequency + mantra), POST /api/smartdock/unslot, GET /api/smartdock/eligible. Wisdom: GET /api/wisdom/tiers (4 tiers: Seeds 0+, Roots 5+, Branches 15+, Canopy 30+ interactions), GET /api/wisdom/for-specimen/{id} (tiered wisdom gated by interaction count), POST /api/wisdom/plant (requires 30 interactions), GET /api/wisdom/canopy-feed. Frontend data-testids: refinement-lab-page, tumbler-section, starseed-panel, tool-selector, tool-{brush|pick|chisel}, extract-and-tumble-btn, refine-specimen-{id}, smartdock-page, pedestal-active, pedestal-empty, slot-stone-btn, unslot-btn, stone-picker-modal, slot-stone-{id}, enter-refinement-lab, enter-smartdock.
